title: CTM Optifine - Fabric
body:
![banner](https://git.sr.ht/~aeldit/MC-Resource-Packs/blob/main/images/banner_ctm.png)

[![continuity](https://git.sr.ht/~aeldit/MC-Resource-Packs/blob/main/images/requires_continuity.svg)](https://modrinth.com/mod/continuity)
or
[![optifine](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3/assets/cozy/requires/optifine_vector.svg)](https://optifine.net/home)

## Adds connected textures to the game (works with Optifine and Continuity)

## Here are some visual examples of what this pack does

> Left is what a 3x3 area of blocks looks like in vanilla, and right is with the texture pack

![img_ctm_off](https://git.sr.ht/~aeldit/MC-Resource-Packs/blob/main/images/ctm/iso_diamond_off.png)
![img_ctm_on](https://git.sr.ht/~aeldit/MC-Resource-Packs/blob/main/images/ctm/iso_diamond_on.png)

![img_ctm2_off](https://git.sr.ht/~aeldit/MC-Resource-Packs/blob/main/images/ctm/iso_tinted_glass_off.png)
![img_ctm2_on](https://git.sr.ht/~aeldit/MC-Resource-Packs/blob/main/images/ctm/iso_tinted_glass_on.png)

## Blocks done

> The redstone lamp and the copper blocks are included in all their respective states (on/off, waxed, ...)
>
> All the log/stem types are included

<details>
<summary>Show available blocks</summary>

### Vanilla

![blocks](https://git.sr.ht/~aeldit/MC-Resource-Packs/blob/main/images/ctm/vanilla.png)

![logs](https://git.sr.ht/~aeldit/MC-Resource-Packs/blob/main/images/ctm/logs.png)

### Biomes O' Plenty

![bop](https://git.sr.ht/~aeldit/MC-Resource-Packs/blob/main/images/ctm/bop.png)

### Versecraft

![versecraft](https://git.sr.ht/~aeldit/MC-Resource-Packs/blob/main/images/ctm/versecraft.png)

### Desire

![desire](https://git.sr.ht/~aeldit/MC-Resource-Packs/blob/main/images/ctm/desire.png)

### Create

![create](https://git.sr.ht/~aeldit/MC-Resource-Packs/blob/main/images/ctm/create.png)

</details>

If you want to be able to select which blocks in the pack have connected textures, you might want to check out this project: https://modrinth.com/mod/ctm-selector

## Credits

The base textures from the Biomes O' Plenty mod have not been made by me, I simply modified them to be connected. To get the mod, go there: https://modrinth.com/mod/biomes-o-plenty

The base textures from the Versecraft mod have not been made by me, I simply modified them to be connected. To get the mod, go there: https://modrinth.com/mod/versecraft

The base textures from the Desire mod have not been made by me, I simply edited them to make them connected. To get the mod, go there: https://modrinth.com/mod/desiremod

The base textures from the Create mod have not been made by me, I simply edited them to make them connected. To get the mod, go there: https://modrinth.com/mod/create-fabric

***

> If you find an issue with this pack, please open an issue here: https://todo.sr.ht/~aeldit/MC-Resourcepacks-And-Datapacks so I can fix it
>
> If you have a suggestion, go on the discord and create a post in 🗽-suggestions-forum
>
> [![discord_badge](https://img.shields.io/discord/750243612473819188?color=7289da&label=DISCORD&logo=discord&logoColor=7289da&style=for-the-badge)](https://discord.gg/PcYPpqzhKS)
